payload.answer: That’s too broad to store as a useful personal memory. Please choose a specific AI-related fact, preference, project detail, or learning goal you want remembered.
repair_options: Remember a specific AI interest, e.g. “I’m interested in generative AI.”
Remember a learning goal, e.g. “I want to learn how transformers work.”
Remember a project detail, e.g. “I’m building an AI chatbot for customer support.”
Remember a preference, e.g. “I prefer practical AI explanations with examples.”
Do not save anything for now.
